name: TabQuest
description: Embark on a journey of productivity with TabQuest. Tailored for developers and general users, TabQuest helps you effortlessly manage bookmarks, tasks, and notes. Enjoy a sleek, professional interface and a customizable home page for easy access to your favorites and social media. With searchable notes and bookmarks, TabQuest keeps you organized and boosts your browsing experience.
author: mohamedhalith.smh@gmail.com
